ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Lettera Del R.P.M. Paolo Antonio Foscarini Carmelitano. Sopra l`Opinione de` Pittagorici, e del Copernico.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Della Mobilità della Terra, e stabilità del Sole, e del nuovo Pittagorico Sistema del Mondo. Al Reverendiss. P. M. Sebastiano Fantone Generale dell`ordine Carmelitano.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This text was commissioned by Vincenzo Carafa, a member of the Oziosi academy in Naples. On p. 13 the author mentions Galileo Galilei and the Lincei academy. The last page contains some manuscript notes. In 1616 Foscarini`s text was included in the Index Librorum Prohibitorum.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur. P. Ant. Ghibert. Vic. Gen. Ioannes Longus Can. & Cur. Archiep. Neap. Theol. vidit.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
